text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ouuuch...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I messed up... I was certain I'd checked my fortune
and the flow of qi.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Though, somehow the earth's voice feels distant today...
owww!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah, no. It's fine! Something like this won't prevent
me from spreading the word of feng shui far and
wide!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Let's patch it up quickly and get back to training!
choice_data_list: I won't tolerate such reckless behavior.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha, there's no need to make that face, Trainer!
I'm fine, so let's hurry back to training!
choice_data_list: Isn't maintaining your health a part of feng shui?
Isn't maintaining your health a part of feng shui?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're... right. Haha, sorry! I wasn't really
thinking with a level head.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I think I was so focused on what's in front of me, I lost
sight of the bigger picture. That could be why I couldn't
hear the earth's voice.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. No more training for today. I'm
going to properly focus on resting and
recovering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her calm front, I can tell that she's feeling
down. It takes a long time for Copano Rickey to
return to full health.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Of course! If I pay attention to my luck, I'll
definitely be fine! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Based on today's lucky direction, lucky color, and
the affinity of the five elements, I'd say the gym is
today's lucky spot! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Right, then. Let's get back to training! I can avoid
worsening my injury by exercising parts of my
body one at a time. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Haa, haa... nghh!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Th-this might be tougher than I imagined... But, I
have to do my very best so I can spread the word
of feng shui...
choice_data_list: I think you should focus on recovering for now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. If I use feng shui to boost my luck
and health, I'll be able to recover in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'll do my best to properly rest up and
recover as fast as I can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, she seems to be feeling
down, and her recovery takes longer than
expected.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff !

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep! This is great! Coming to the gym was
definitely a good idea!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm going to focus on weight training
today to try and increase my base strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps thanks to the positivity she gets from
feng shui, Copano Rickey is able to complete her
weight training without worsening her injury.
